frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present; valid semver; description 553 chars folded (under 1024); > at L4 is YAML scalar marker (permitted); allowed-tools hyphenated; owns empty for workflow skill; composes_with lists real local skills.

description_quality.notes: Action verb (Fetch, triage, and address), 9+ trigger keyword variants, proactive trigger statement for returning users.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 195 lines / ~1020 words. No references/ directory (operational runbook fits atomically). All gh CLI commands inline.

instruction_clarity.notes: Numbered Workflow steps 1-7 with imperative voice. Triage table maps category → action with examples. Rationale for --paginate. Specific reviewer-type handling explicit.

coordination.notes: composes_with [git-pr, git-commit] both exist and chain correctly. spawned_by empty. owns correctly empty for workflow over remote API + local files.

completeness.notes: All workflow content self-contained. gh CLI with --paginate + WHY. Edge Cases explicit (already-replied, outdated, multiple commits, no comments). Reply templates by category.

anti_patterns.notes: Triage guidelines guard against stale-diff acting. 'Verify before acting' for Copilot. 'Stage files by name not git add -p' with WHY. No emojis, no excessive MUST/NEVER.

nits.fix: Correct for this skill (may read any commented file); could narrow but not necessary.

nits.item: Description uses > folded scalar with semantically-meaningless line breaks
nits.fix: Stylistic consistency nit (same as other git/ skills).

nits.item: {owner}/{repo}/{pr} placeholders at L147-153 not shell variables — could confuse paste-and-run users
nits.fix: Add note above code block: 'Substitute {owner}/{repo}/{pr} from gh pr view --json url,number; these are not shell variables.'

nits.item: 'Already-replied comment' detection phrased differently at L68-70 vs L188-189
nits.fix: Pick one phrasing and use both places.

top_fixes.fix: Add explicit cross-link to git-commit at L128
Clarify that {owner}/{repo}/{pr} are placeholders not shell variables
Normalize 'already-replied comment' detection wording between L68-70 and L188-189
